## Change

Describe the code, evidence, study, formula, reference, task, or documentation change.

## Evidence and formula impact

- Source spans or decision record:
- Evidence views affected:
- Formula/schema/reference hashes affected:
- ANI-affiliated study conflict of interest:

## Verification

- [ ] Schema and semantic validation
- [ ] Formula compile check
- [ ] Focused and full tests
- [ ] Anti-gaming impact
- [ ] Generated outputs rebuilt
- [ ] Privacy/license scan
- [ ] No private paths, controlled data, or credentials
